response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title '宵々古今' (Yoi Yoi Kokon) and artists Reol/Giga from on-screen text. Performed search for lyrics using: '宵々古今 Reol Giga Japanese and English lyrics'. Retrieved lyrics from results. The video features a single performance of this song.
response.global_summary: A 3D virtual music performance of the song '宵々古今' (Yoi Yoi Kokon) performed by Hololive VTubers Nakiri Ayame and Shirakami Fubuki.

scenes.description: The main performance of '宵々古今' by Nakiri Ayame and Shirakami Fubuki.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
らっしゃいな　平は成り
時は来た　正し
夢現　夜もすがら
変わりゆく　事に
恐れ　なし
のっぴき　ならぬのは御免
手まり歌いたい
君達が誘う
闇中に後ろ髪を引かれても　進むべきなり
えや　えや　え
はやり　すたりの　うきよなら
あしんずる　ものはただ
君だけと　言わん
通り過ぎ　飲み屋　歌い屋
あんどろ　事などないな　この世
人の世は怨めし
鉄火はちゃらちゃら
悲し　すがた　で　まじさいで
それそれそれそれ
今をなげいて
春を待てども
君の心の　うちの
枯る　涙がわ
それじゃ叶わん
どこに行けもめくらめく大名　君を連れて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Welcome, come in, all you who live in the Heisei
It’s a reality of beautiful dreams every night
Scared of things changing
Stopping our steps forward is the worst fear.
Everyday we move on like we’re teaching Kyoto’s truth, we’ve gotten this
The nights go by, changing
Losing the path, the worst thing to do is to apologize
The nights I want to sing in
You call out to me
In the night, the back of my hair is pulled
It’s the right thing to do
The nights, the days, the days after, the days after
This party continues
Dance, sing, turn around, turn around!
Tonight is the night
The nights of the week?
The nights, the days, the days after
This party continues
Dance, sing, turn around, turn around!
Tonight is the night
The nights of the week?
